productDisplayName: Hush Puppies Men Walsh Brown Sandals
description: Crafted from superior leather in a classic design, this Walsh floater from hush puppies is a perfect blend of comfort and style. The padded straps and suede footbed offer a luxurious feel to the feet.UpperFull grain leather straps in a velvet finish with padded fabric liningBuckle closure on the ankle strap to offer a customised FitCushioned leather footbed with a suede foot patchOutsoleTextured TPU outsole with multi-directional grooves for enhanced grip and tractionCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner for the straps if neededDo not store in direct sunlight
